zh.Ellesmere, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾艾勒斯莫
zh.Ellesmere, Shropshire, England, United K: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾艾勒斯莫
zh.Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾史福斯波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Madoc Kynaston於大約1300年出生在英國史洛普爾艾勒斯莫時，他的父親Phillip Kynaston21歲，母親Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan32歲。他和Silotta verch Jenkin至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1377年在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利享年78歲。

zh-hans.Ellesmere, Shropshire, England: 英国史洛普爾艾勒斯莫
zh-hans.Ellesmere, Shropshire, England, United K: 英国英格兰史洛普爾艾勒斯莫
zh-hans.Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England: 英国史洛普爾史福斯波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Madoc Kynaston于大约1300年出生在英国史洛普爾艾勒斯莫时，他的父亲Phillip Kynaston21岁，母亲Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan32岁。他和Silotta verch Jenkin至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1377年在英国史洛普爾史福斯波利享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kynaston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Kynaston: in Kinnerley (Shropshire), in Hentland (Herefordshire), or in Much Marcle (Herefordshire).

nameMeanings.name: Madoc
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, possibly having the sense ‘fortunate’ or alternatively from Celtic aodh ‘fire’.

variants.name: Madog
meanings: Traditional name, possibly having the sense ‘fortunate’ or alternatively from Celtic aodh ‘fire’.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Madoc Kynaston was born about 1300, in Ellesmere, Shropshire, England, his father, Phillip Kynaston, was 21 and his mother, Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan, was 32. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Silotta verch Jenkin. He died in 1377, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Madoc Kynaston est né environ 1300, à Ellesmere, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Phillip Kynaston, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Silotta verch Jenkin. Il est décédé en 1377, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Madoc Kynaston um 1300 in Ellesmere, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Phillip Kynaston 21 und seine Mutter Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan 32. Er hatte mit Silotta verch Jenkin mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1377 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Madoc Kynaston è nato il circa 1300 nel Ellesmere, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Phillip Kynaston, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Silotta verch Jenkin. Morì nel 1377, nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Madoc Kynastonが約1300年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアエレスメアで生まれた時，父Phillip Kynastonは21歳，母Gweruilla Rogeri Vychanは32歳であった。彼はSilotta verch Jenkinとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1377年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Madoc Kynaston(이)가 대략 1300년 영국 슈럽실르 엘레스머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Phillip Kynaston(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Silotta verch Jenkin(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1377년 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Ellesmere, Shropshire, England, United K: Ellesmere, Salopesberia, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Madoc Kynaston nasceu aproximadamente 1300, em Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Phillip Kynaston, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Silotta verch Jenkin. Ele faleceu em 1377, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Madoc Kynaston родился около 1300 г. в местности эллесмир, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Phillip Kynaston было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan, 32. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Silotta verch Jenkin. Он умер в 1377 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Madoc Kynaston nació aproximadamente 1300, en Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Phillip Kynaston, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Silotta verch Jenkin. Murió en 1377, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años.
